mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employees(id, staff_id, staff_no, staff_name, nick_name, mobile_no, email, staff_status, id_card_type, id_card_no, department_name, position_name, sex, staff_type, marry_status, highest_education, work_place, birthday, contract_begin_date, contract_end_date, enroll_in_date, probation_end_date, created_date, last_update_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.staffId}, #{item.staffNo}, #{item.staffName}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.mobileNo}, #{item.email}, #{item.staffStatus}, #{item.idCardType}, #{item.idCardNo}, #{item.departmentName}, #{item.positionName}, #{item.sex}, #{item.staffType}, #{item.marryStatus}, #{item.highestEducation}, #{item.workPlace}, #{item.birthday}, #{item.contractBeginDate}, #{item.contractEndDate}, #{item.enrollInDate}, #{item.probationEndDate}, #{item.createdDate}, #{item.lastUpdateDate}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
